common.official: Official domain: assawave.io — beware of other sites

phishing.title: Stay safe
phishing.body: The only official domain is assawave.io. Any token sale, airdrop, or message claiming to be ASSA WAVE on other domains (.ai / .net), social media, or DMs is a scam. The official contract address will be published here and in the whitepaper at mainnet launch.

hero.eyebrow: Web3 fan economy · Built on Base
hero.h1Pre: The new wave of K-pop fandom,
hero.lead: Streaming turned passion into billions — yet fans never owned a share. ASSA WAVE puts that value on-chain: what fans spend creates value, and that value flows back to fans.
hero.micro: ASSA — the star of the stage.

problem.label: Manifesto
problem.h1Em: but the value never came back.
items: Billions of plays, nothing for fans. Revenue stays with platforms and middlemen.
Streaming parties, voting, translation — fans' time and money build results they hold no stake in.
Accounts, points and goods live on a company ledger. One policy change can erase them.

trinity.label: Solution
trinity.lead: Around $ASSA, streaming, spending and nodes circulate to keep supply and demand in balance.

items.b: Fan streaming is recorded on-chain as WAVE and flows back as rewards.
Spending on goods, events and content burns $ASSA, shrinking supply and concentrating value.
Fan and partner nodes run the network and share in emissions. (Phase 2)

tokenomics.label: Tokenomics
tokenomics.lede: Mining emission (supply) is absorbed by no-yield locking and spend-burning (demand). The contracts enforce this balance on-chain. 10B hard cap.
tokenomics.burnAria: Cumulative burn trend (illustrative model). 70% of spend burned; BME buys back and burns from revenue.
tokenomics.burnCaption: Cumulative burn (illustrative · live once the indexer is connected)
tokenomics.lockHead: No interest, no APY — by design
tokenomics.lockBody: Locking pays no yield. It grants only ranking, governance and tier weight, reducing sell pressure to absorb supply. Principal only is returned at expiry.
tokenomics.sinkHead: The more it is used, the more it is gone
tokenomics.sinkBody: 70% of spend is burned, and a share of external revenue (B2C 20% · B2B 30–40%) buys back and permanently burns $ASSA.

market.label: Market & Scenarios
market.lede: On top of the K-pop fandom economy and the MagicSing install base, locking and burning demand absorbs mining supply.
market.statsNote: ※ Figures are estimates and will be updated when finalized.
market.scenarioAria: Demand and supply scenario curves. Supply (mining emission) declines while demand (locking and burning) rises, crossing at the balance point.

demand.title: Demand absorption
demand.body: No-yield locking and spend-burning shrink circulating supply and absorb sell pressure.

supply.title: Supply schedule
supply.body: Mining emission is front-loaded — heavy early and declining over time.

assumption.title: Scenario assumptions
assumption.body: An illustrative model on conservative assumptions; it does not guarantee outcomes.

node.label: Node network
node.lede: ASSA nodes run on edge-AI hardware. Fans and partners operate them to run the network and share in emissions — no data center required.
node.note: Reference device: Firefly AIBOX-K3 (SpacemiT K3 RISC-V). Final node spec TBD.
